title: Web Dashboard
excerpt: Learn how to use the web version of the Stripe Dashboard. The [Stripe Dashboard](https://dashboard.stripe.com/) is the user interface where you manage and configure your account. You can use the Dashboard to navigate account resources, [search transactions](https://docs.stripe.com/dashboard/search.md), invite team members, monitor your integration, and more. On your keyboard, press the question mark key (`?`) for a list of available keyboard shortcuts for common actions. The Dashboard officially supports the following web browsers: - The last 20 major versions of Chrome, Firefox, and Edge. If you don’t have access to the Dashboard, [set up your Stripe account](https://docs.stripe.com/get-started/account/set-up.md).…
